name: 15_ E.A Resident Nett Rates 2025 - 2026 Oserengoni(Chui Lodge,Bush Homes)

origin.filename: 15_ E.A Resident Nett Rates 2025 - 2026 Oserengoni(Chui Lodge,Bush Homes).pdf

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHUI LODGE - 2025-2026 East African Res Nett Rates -15%
texts.text: CHUI LODGE - 2025-2026 East African Res Nett Rates -15%

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Exclusive vehicle use US$250.00 per day within Oserengoni Conservancy Fees (subject to availability).
texts.text: Exclusive vehicle use US$250.00 per day within Oserengoni Conservancy Fees (subject to availability).

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: CHUI BUSH HOMES -  2025-2026 East African Res Nett Rates -15%
texts.text: CHUI BUSH HOMES -  2025-2026 East African Res Nett Rates -15%

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Check-in from Noon, and check-out before 10 am. Extra lunches (or packed lunches) will be charged at US$40.00 per meal. Rates are per person per night and include VAT & catering levy
texts.text: Check-in from Noon, and check-out before 10 am. Extra lunches (or packed lunches) will be charged at US$40.00 per meal. Rates are per person per night and include VAT & catering levy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Christmas supplement of US$40.00 per adult (half price for children) per night applies Dec 24, 25, 26, 31, 01 Jan
texts.text: Christmas supplement of US$40.00 per adult (half price for children) per night applies Dec 24, 25, 26, 31, 01 Jan

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Easter Supplement of US$40.00 per adult (half price for children) per night applies for Easter Friday to Easter Monday
texts.text: Easter Supplement of US$40.00 per adult (half price for children) per night applies for Easter Friday to Easter Monday

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Easter and Christmas bookings are minimum 2 night stays
texts.text: Easter and Christmas bookings are minimum 2 night stays

texts.label: text
texts.orig: In house activities include game drives, night drives, bush walks, boat rides, sundowner & bush breakfast ALL on Oserengoni Wildlife Sanctuary External Extra activities include day trips to Nakuru National Park, hiking in Hell's Gate, climbing Mount Longonot, Crescent Island, Elementaita.
texts.text: In house activities include game drives, night drives, bush walks, boat rides, sundowner & bush breakfast ALL on Oserengoni Wildlife Sanctuary External Extra activities include day trips to Nakuru National Park, hiking in Hell's Gate, climbing Mount Longonot, Crescent Island, Elementaita.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: High season is 1st June to 30th September and 20th December to 10th January
texts.text: High season is 1st June to 30th September and 20th December to 10th January

texts.label: text
texts.orig: IF TWO CHILDREN SHARE A ROOM, 1ST CHILD FULL ADULT PRICE, 2ND CHILD 50%
texts.text: IF TWO CHILDREN SHARE A ROOM, 1ST CHILD FULL ADULT PRICE, 2ND CHILD 50%

texts.label: text
texts.orig: ALL PAYMENT SHOULD ONLY BE MADE PAYABLE TO LA PIEVE LTD
texts.text: ALL PAYMENT SHOULD ONLY BE MADE PAYABLE TO LA PIEVE LTD

table_cells.text: Full board accommodation, water, soft drinks, house beers& wines, bush breakfast, morning, evening, and night game drives, sundowner, boat ride, mula hill climb, organic vegetable, and dairy farm visit.

Oserengoni Wildlife Sanctuary fees (Kes. 4350/- per adult, Kes. 2,175/- per child), Premium spirits, All extra activities (Horse riding, Bush dinner,Hells gate visit, crescent island visit, Mt. Longonot hill climb, Lake Elementaita visit, Lake Nakuru National Park, Eburu forest and crater lake visit)
